zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Catherine MacLeod of Dunvegan於1518年出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾登維根時，她的父親Alisdair Crotach MacLeod 8th Chief of Clan MacLeod43歲，母親Lady Margaret Cameron of Lochiel43歲。她於大約1543年與Angus MacAllister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry在英國蘇格蘭音巴內-爾格倫加利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1580年9月20日在英國蘇格蘭羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪斯特洛享年62歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Catherine MacLeod of Dunvegan于1518年出生在苏格兰音巴內-爾登維根时，她的父亲Alisdair Crotach MacLeod 8th Chief of Clan MacLeod43岁，母亲Lady Margaret Cameron of Lochiel43岁。她于大约1543年与Angus MacAllister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry在英国苏格兰音巴內-爾格倫加利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1580年9月20日在英国苏格兰羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪斯特洛享年62岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: MacLeod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLeod
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Leòid ‘son of Leòd’, a patronymic from a Gaelic form of Old Norse Liótr ‘ugly’, a common personal name in medieval Norway and Iceland.

History: This is the name of a major Scottish Hebridean clan, associated in particular with Dunvegan on the isle of Skye; also, historically, with the island of Lewis. There are two main branches: the McLeods of Harris and Dunvegan (Sìol Tormoid) and the McLeods of Lewis (Sìol Torcaill). Both branches claim descent from a certain Leòd (Norse: Liótr), who lived in the 13th century. — One prominent bearer of this prominent Scottish name, Alexander McLeod (1774–1833), a Reformed Presbyterian clergyman, author, and editor, emigrated to the US in 1792 from the island of Mull in the Hebrides.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Catherine MacLeod of Dunvegan was born in 1518, in Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Scotland, her father, Alisdair Crotach MacLeod 8th Chief of Clan MacLeod, was 43 and her mother, Lady Margaret Cameron of Lochiel, was 43. She married Angus MacAllister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry about 1543, in Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 20 September 1580, in Strome, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Catherine MacLeod of Dunvegan est née en 1518, à Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Écosse, son père, Alisdair Crotach MacLeod 8th Chief of Clan MacLeod, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Cameron of Lochiel, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Angus MacAllister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry environ 1543, à Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 20 septembre 1580, à Strome, Ross and Cromarty, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

Sie hat um 1543 in Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom Angus MacAllister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 20. September 1580 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Strome, Ross and Cromarty, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Catherine MacLeod of Dunveganが1518年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアダンベガンで生まれた時，父Alisdair Crotach MacLeod 8th Chief of Clan MacLeodは43歳，母Lady Margaret Cameron of Lochielは43歳であった。約1543年にイギリススコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアグレンガーリーでAngus MacAllister MacDonald 7th of Glengarryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1580年9月20日にイギリススコットランドロス アンド クロマルトイストロメで62歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.Strome Castle, Loch Catton, Cromarty & R: 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 스트롬
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Catherine MacLeod of Dunvegan(이)가 1518년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 던베건에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alisdair Crotach MacLeod 8th Chief of Clan MacLeod(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Cameron of Lochiel(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 대략 1543년 영국 스코틀랜드 인버네스-실르 글렌가리에서 Angus MacAllister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1580년 9월 20일 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 스트롬에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Angus MacAllister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry aproximadamente 1543, em Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. ru.Strome Castle, Loch Catton, Cromarty & R: стром, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Catherine MacLeod of Dunvegan родилась в 1518 г. в местности дунвеган, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Alisdair Crotach MacLeod 8th Chief of Clan MacLeod было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Cameron of Lochiel, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Angus MacAllister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry около 1543 г. в местности гленгарри, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 20 сентября 1580 г. в местности стром, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

Se casó con Angus MacAllister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry aproximadamente 1543, en Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 20 de septiembre de 1580, en Strome, Ross and Cromarty, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
